test_commands.spec_tests: npm run lint --prefix web && npm run build --prefix web

task_groups.title: Write spec tests: project initialization and toolchain checks

subtasks.title: Write filesystem structure tests for project initialization (TS-02-1, TS-02-2, TS-02-3, TS-02-4)
details: Write a test script (e.g., a shell script or Node.js script) that asserts web/package.json exists and is valid JSON with a 'name' field.
Assert web/package-lock.json exists; assert no yarn.lock or pnpm-lock.yaml in web/.
Assert web/tsconfig.json compilerOptions includes strict=true, moduleResolution='bundler', target='ESNext', jsx='react-jsx'.
Assert web/components.json exists and is valid JSON with 'style' or '$schema' keys confirming shadcn/ui init was run.

subtasks.title: Write dependency installation tests for toolchain packages (TS-02-5 through TS-02-9)
details: Assert 'vite' in web/package.json devDependencies and web/node_modules/vite directory exists.
Assert 'react' and 'react-dom' in web/package.json dependencies and their node_modules directories exist.
Assert 'tailwindcss' in web/package.json deps and web/node_modules/tailwindcss exists.
Assert '@tanstack/react-query' in web/package.json deps and its node_modules directory exists.
Assert 'react-router-dom' or 'react-router' in web/package.json deps and its node_modules directory exists.

subtasks.title: Write build and lint execution tests (TS-02-10, TS-02-11)
details: Write a test that runs 'npm run build' from web/ and asserts exit code 0, web/dist/ exists, contains at least one .html file and one .js file.
Write a test that runs 'npm run lint' from web/ and asserts exit code 0 and no 'error' lines in output.

subtasks.title: Write dev proxy configuration tests (TS-02-12, TS-02-13)
details: Write a test that starts a mock HTTP server on port 8080 returning a sentinel body, starts the Vite dev server, and asserts that requests to /api, /healthz, /readyz are forwarded and return the sentinel body.
Write a static test that reads the Vite config file in web/ and asserts it contains '/api', '/healthz', '/readyz', and 'http://localhost:8080'.

subtasks.title: Write ESLint configuration and Makefile target tests (TS-02-14, TS-02-15, TS-02-16, TS-02-17, TS-02-18)
details: Read ESLint config file (eslint.config.js or .eslintrc.cjs) in web/ and assert it references '@typescript-eslint/recommended' or 'typescript-eslint'.
Assert that at least one of eslint.config.js, eslint.config.ts, eslint.config.mjs, or .eslintrc.cjs exists in web/.
Write a test that starts 'make web-dev' from repo root and asserts Vite dev server prints its URL within 15 seconds.
Write a test that runs 'make web-build' from repo root and asserts exit code 0 and web/dist/ populated with HTML and JS.
Write a test that runs 'make web-lint' from repo root and asserts exit code 0.

subtasks.title: Write placeholder route and source file tests (TS-02-19 through TS-02-22)
details: Assert web/index.html exists and contains 'src/main.tsx' or 'main.tsx' in a script tag.
Assert web/src/main.tsx exists, contains 'createRoot' or 'render', and references 'App'.
Assert web/src/App.tsx exists, contains '<h1>', and contains 'af-hub'.
Write a browser-based test (using playwright or similar) that navigates to the Vite dev server root URL and asserts exactly one <h1> element with text 'af-hub'.

checks: All test scripts/files are created and syntactically valid (no parse errors when loaded).
Test runner can discover and execute the spec tests without crashing: npm run lint --prefix web exits 0 on the test files themselves.
No implementation code has been written yet — only test scaffolding exists.

task_groups.title: Write edge case and property tests

subtasks.title: Write edge case tests for missing project files (TS-02-E1, TS-02-E9, TS-02-E10)
details: Write TS-02-E1: remove web/package.json, run 'npm run build' from web/, assert non-zero exit and error about missing package.json.
Write TS-02-E9: delete web/src/main.tsx, run 'npm run build', assert non-zero exit and output references 'main.tsx' or 'entry'.
Write TS-02-E10: delete web/index.html, run 'npm run build', assert non-zero exit and output references 'index.html'.
Each test must restore the deleted file after running to avoid polluting subsequent tests.

subtasks.title: Write edge case tests for type errors, lint violations, and missing node_modules (TS-02-E2, TS-02-E3, TS-02-E4)
details: Write TS-02-E2: inject 'const x: number = "bad_type";' into App.tsx, run npm run build, assert non-zero exit and 'App.tsx' in output; restore original file.
Write TS-02-E3: inject 'const unused = 42;' into App.tsx, run npm run lint, assert non-zero exit and 'App.tsx' in output with line number; restore original file.
Write TS-02-E4: remove web/node_modules/, run npm run build and npm run lint, assert both exit non-zero with error referencing missing modules; restore node_modules after.

subtasks.title: Write edge case tests for proxy and ESLint plugin errors (TS-02-E5, TS-02-E6, TS-02-E7, TS-02-E8)
details: Write TS-02-E5: with Go backend not running, send GET to Vite dev server /healthz, assert network error or 502/504 status and body does not contain 'af-hub'.
Write TS-02-E6: with Go backend not running, send GET to /some-other-path, assert 200 response with HTML content (SPA fallback).
Write TS-02-E7: remove web/node_modules/@typescript-eslint, run npm run lint, assert non-zero exit and 'typescript-eslint' or 'cannot find module' in output; restore after.
Write TS-02-E8: remove web/node_modules/, run 'make web-build' from repo root, assert non-zero exit and actionable error in output.

subtasks.title: Write property tests for build reproducibility, lint baseline, and TypeScript strict mode (TS-02-P1, TS-02-P2, TS-02-P3)
details: Write TS-02-P1: run 'npm run build' from web/, assert exit code 0, web/dist/ exists with at least one .html file, assert completion within 120 seconds.
Write TS-02-P2: for each .ts/.tsx file in web/src/, run ESLint targeting that file and assert exit code 0 and zero errors within 60 seconds.
Write TS-02-P3: run 'npx tsc --noEmit' from web/, assert exit code 0, no 'error TS' in stdout/stderr, and tsconfig compilerOptions.strict == true.

subtasks.title: Write property tests for proxy path coverage and placeholder route rendering (TS-02-P4, TS-02-P5)
details: Write TS-02-P4: for each of /api, /api/anything, /api/v1/resource, /healthz, /healthz/details, /readyz, /readyz/status, start a mock backend on port 8080 returning 'BACKEND_SENTINEL', start Vite dev server, assert each proxied response body equals 'BACKEND_SENTINEL' and does not contain 'af-hub'.
Write TS-02-P5: for 3 consecutive browser navigations to Vite dev server root /, assert exactly one <h1> element with text content 'af-hub' each time.

checks: All edge case and property test files are syntactically valid.
Test cleanup logic (file restoration, node_modules restoration) is present in each destructive test.
No implementation code introduced — only test files.

subtasks.title: Create the web/ directory with package.json and scaffold Vite + React + TypeScript project
details: Run 'npm create vite@latest web -- --template react-ts' from the repository root (or equivalent) to scaffold the project.
Ensure web/package.json is present, valid JSON, and has a 'name' field; no frontend package.json at the repository root.
Confirm react and react-dom are in dependencies, vite is in devDependencies.

subtasks.title: Configure web/tsconfig.json with required compiler options
details: Open web/tsconfig.json and verify or set: strict=true, moduleResolution='bundler', target='ESNext', jsx='react-jsx'.
These are the Vite-recommended defaults; confirm the scaffold already includes them or add them explicitly.
Do not remove other Vite-generated tsconfig options.

subtasks.title: Install Tailwind CSS, TanStack Query, and React Router
details: Run 'npm install tailwindcss @tailwindcss/vite' (or 'npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer') inside web/ and initialize Tailwind config.
Run 'npm install @tanstack/react-query' inside web/.
Run 'npm install react-router-dom' inside web/.
Verify all three packages appear in web/package.json and web/node_modules/.

subtasks.title: Run npx shadcn-ui init and commit components.json
details: Run 'npx shadcn-ui init' (or the current CLI equivalent such as 'npx shadcn@latest init') from within web/.
Answer the initialization prompts as appropriate (style, base color, CSS variables).
Confirm web/components.json is generated and contains 'style' or '$schema' keys.
Stage web/components.json for commit.

subtasks.title: Commit package-lock.json and verify npm is the package manager
details: Run 'npm install' inside web/ to produce web/package-lock.json.
Confirm web/package-lock.json exists and is valid JSON.
Confirm no yarn.lock or pnpm-lock.yaml exists in web/.
Stage web/package-lock.json for commit.

checks: TS-02-1 passes: web/package.json exists and is valid JSON with a 'name' field.
TS-02-2 passes: web/package-lock.json exists; no yarn.lock or pnpm-lock.yaml in web/.
TS-02-3 passes: web/tsconfig.json has strict=true, moduleResolution=bundler, target=ESNext, jsx=react-jsx.
TS-02-4 passes: web/components.json exists with shadcn/ui config keys.
TS-02-5, TS-02-6, TS-02-7, TS-02-8, TS-02-9 pass: all required packages present in package.json and node_modules.
npm run build --prefix web exits with code 0 (baseline build succeeds).

subtasks.title: Create web/index.html as the Vite HTML entry point
details: Ensure web/index.html exists (Vite scaffold typically generates this).
Confirm it contains a <script type='module' src='/src/main.tsx'> tag referencing the application entry point.
The file should have a standard HTML5 doctype and a <div id='root'> mount point.

subtasks.title: Create web/src/main.tsx as the React application entry point
details: Ensure web/src/main.tsx exists and imports React and ReactDOM.
Call ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(<App />) to mount the App component.
Import App from './App'.
File must be TypeScript-valid with strict mode enabled — no type errors.

subtasks.title:
Create web/src/App.tsx with the placeholder

af-hub

heading
details: Create web/src/App.tsx exporting a default React function component named App.

The component renders exactly one

af-hub

element and nothing else.
No navigation, no auth flow, no additional elements.
File must be TypeScript-valid with strict mode enabled — no type errors.

checks: TS-02-19 passes: web/index.html exists and references 'src/main.tsx'.
TS-02-20 passes: web/src/main.tsx exists with createRoot and App reference.
TS-02-21 passes: web/src/App.tsx exists with <h1> and 'af-hub'.
npm run build --prefix web exits with code 0 and web/dist/ is populated.
npx tsc --noEmit (from web/) exits with code 0 — no TypeScript errors.

task_groups.title: Configure Vite dev proxy and ESLint

subtasks.title: Add dev proxy configuration to Vite config for /api, /healthz, and /readyz
details: Open the Vite configuration file (vite.config.ts or vite.config.js) in web/.
Add a server.proxy block mapping '/api', '/healthz', and '/readyz' each to target 'http://localhost:8080'.
Use defineConfig from 'vite' to wrap the configuration.
No CORS middleware changes needed on the Go backend — proxy handles this at the dev server level.
Verify the config file contains the string 'http://localhost:8080' and the three proxy paths.

subtasks.title: Configure ESLint with @typescript-eslint/recommended ruleset
details: Install @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin and @typescript-eslint/parser if not already present: 'npm install -D @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin @typescript-eslint/parser' inside web/.
Use the Vite-generated ESLint config as the starting point; extend or import '@typescript-eslint/recommended' ruleset.
Choose the config format (flat config eslint.config.js or legacy .eslintrc.cjs) based on the installed ESLint version.
Verify that 'npm run lint' script is defined in web/package.json.

subtasks.title: Verify npm run lint and npm run build scripts are defined in web/package.json
details: Confirm web/package.json has a 'scripts' section with 'build' (runs vite build) and 'lint' (runs eslint + optional tsc --noEmit).
Confirm 'dev' script is also present (runs vite).
Run 'npm run build' from web/ and assert exit code 0 with web/dist/ populated.
Run 'npm run lint' from web/ and assert exit code 0 with no errors on scaffold sources.

checks: TS-02-13 passes: Vite config file contains '/api', '/healthz', '/readyz', and 'http://localhost:8080'.
TS-02-14 passes: ESLint config references '@typescript-eslint/recommended' or 'typescript-eslint'.
TS-02-15 passes: eslint.config.js or .eslintrc.cjs (or equivalent) exists in web/.
TS-02-10 passes: npm run build exits 0 and web/dist/ contains .html and .js files.
TS-02-11 passes: npm run lint exits 0 with no errors on scaffold sources.
eslint web/src reports no warnings or errors.

task_groups.title: Add Makefile targets for frontend operations

subtasks.title: Add make web-dev target to root Makefile
details: Open the root Makefile and add a 'web-dev' target that runs 'npm run dev' inside web/.
The target should cd into web/ and invoke npm run dev (e.g., 'cd web && npm run dev').
Mark the target as .PHONY so make does not treat it as a file target.

subtasks.title: Add make web-build target to root Makefile
details: Add a 'web-build' target that runs 'npm run build' inside web/ (e.g., 'cd web && npm run build').
Ensure the target propagates the exit code so 'make web-build' fails when 'npm run build' fails.
Mark the target as .PHONY.

subtasks.title: Add make web-lint target to root Makefile
details: Add a 'web-lint' target that runs 'npm run lint' inside web/ (e.g., 'cd web && npm run lint').
Ensure the target propagates the exit code so 'make web-lint' fails when 'npm run lint' fails.
Mark the target as .PHONY.
Verify all three Makefile targets exist: web-dev, web-build, web-lint.

checks: TS-02-16 passes: 'make web-dev' starts Vite dev server and prints its URL within 15 seconds.
TS-02-17 passes: 'make web-build' exits 0 and web/dist/ is populated with .html and .js files.
TS-02-18 passes: 'make web-lint' exits 0 with no error diagnostics.
Root Makefile contains .PHONY declarations for web-dev, web-build, and web-lint.
All three Makefile targets delegate correctly to npm scripts inside web/.

subtasks.title: Run complete build and lint pipeline and assert zero errors
details: From the repository root, run 'make web-build' and assert exit code 0.
From the repository root, run 'make web-lint' and assert exit code 0.
From web/, run 'npx tsc --noEmit' and assert exit code 0 with no 'error TS' output.
Confirm web/dist/ exists and contains at least one .html and one .js file.

subtasks.title: Run property tests for build reproducibility, lint baseline, and TypeScript strict mode
details: Execute TS-02-P1: run npm run build from web/ and assert exit 0, dist populated, completion within 120s.
Execute TS-02-P2: for each .ts/.tsx file in web/src/, run ESLint and assert exit 0 with zero errors within 60s.
Execute TS-02-P3: run npx tsc --noEmit from web/, assert exit 0, no 'error TS', and tsconfig strict=true.

subtasks.title: Verify all committed files are staged and no required files are missing
details: Confirm all required files exist: web/package.json, web/package-lock.json, web/tsconfig.json, web/components.json, web/index.html, web/src/main.tsx, web/src/App.tsx.
Confirm web/package-lock.json and web/components.json are tracked by git (not gitignored).
Run 'git status' and confirm no required files are untracked or modified without staging.

checks: make web-build exits with code 0 and web/dist/ is populated.
make web-lint exits with code 0 with zero errors.
npx tsc --noEmit (from web/) exits with code 0.
All seven required files (package.json, package-lock.json, tsconfig.json, components.json, index.html, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx) exist in web/.
TS-02-P1, TS-02-P2, TS-02-P3 all pass.

task_groups.title: Wiring verification: end-to-end integration and stub audit

subtasks.title: Run smoke tests: dev server renders placeholder heading, production build succeeds, lint passes
details: Execute TS-02-SMOKE-1: start make web-dev, navigate browser to Vite dev server URL, assert exactly one <h1> with text 'af-hub'.
Execute TS-02-SMOKE-2: run make web-build from repo root, assert exit 0, web/dist/ contains .html and .js, no errors in stderr.
Execute TS-02-SMOKE-3: run make web-lint from repo root, assert exit 0, no 'error' lines in output.
All three smoke tests must pass with real components — no mocks.

subtasks.title: Run smoke test for dev proxy: verify /healthz request reaches Go backend through Vite proxy
details: Execute TS-02-SMOKE-4: start a real or mock HTTP server on port 8080 returning a sentinel body for /healthz, start make web-dev, send GET to Vite dev server URL /healthz, assert response body matches sentinel and does not contain 'af-hub'.
Also verify /readyz and /api paths are forwarded (TS-02-P4 property test).
Confirm non-proxied paths (e.g., /some-other-path) are served by Vite directly (TS-02-E6).

subtasks.title: Trace execution paths: verify wiring from Makefile targets through npm scripts to Vite and source files
details:
Trace 02-PATH-1: confirm make web-dev → npm run dev → Vite dev server → web/src/main.tsx → web/src/App.tsx →

af-hub

in browser.
Trace 02-PATH-2: confirm make web-build → npm run build → Vite build → web/dist/ populated.
Trace 02-PATH-3: confirm make web-lint → npm run lint → ESLint + tsc → exit 0.
Confirm each Makefile target delegates to npm in the correct working directory (web/) without hardcoded paths elsewhere.

subtasks.title: Stub and dead-code audit: search for throw new Error('not implemented') and TODO stubs in web/src/
details: Search web/src/ for 'throw new Error("not implemented")', 'TODO', 'FIXME', and placeholder comments that indicate unfinished implementation.
Search web/src/ for empty function bodies, components that return null instead of the required JSX, or stub exports.

Confirm web/src/App.tsx returns

af-hub

and is not a stub.
Confirm web/src/main.tsx calls createRoot().render() and is not a stub.
No stub markers or dead code should remain in any file committed as part of the scaffold.

subtasks.title: Verify return value propagation and call-site wiring for all acceptance-criteria-defined behaviors
details: Confirm Makefile web-build target propagates the npm run build exit code to the make process (non-zero build failure causes make to fail).
Confirm Makefile web-lint target propagates the npm run lint exit code to the make process.
Confirm Vite proxy configuration is wired into the running dev server — proxy block is not defined but unused.
Confirm web/src/main.tsx is referenced from web/index.html's script tag — the entry point is actually wired into the HTML.
Confirm web/src/App.tsx is imported and rendered in web/src/main.tsx — the App component is not dead code.

checks:
TS-02-SMOKE-1 passes: make web-dev renders

af-hub

in browser with real Vite dev server.
TS-02-SMOKE-2 passes: make web-build exits 0 and web/dist/ contains .html and .js files.
TS-02-SMOKE-3 passes: make web-lint exits 0 with no errors.
TS-02-SMOKE-4 passes: /healthz proxied to port 8080 returns sentinel body, not frontend content.
Stub audit clean: no 'throw new Error("not implemented")', 'TODO', or empty stub bodies remain in web/src/.
All 22 acceptance tests (TS-02-1 through TS-02-22) pass.
All 5 property tests (TS-02-P1 through TS-02-P5) pass.
eslint web/src exits with code 0 and reports zero errors.
npm run build --prefix web exits with code 0.
